_note: AUTHORITATIVE mutable current-state source. The ONLY place current operational state is defined. Mutate via `tools/project-state.py transition`; validate via `tools/project-state.py validate`; generated status blocks are rendered from here via `tools/project-state.py render`. Do not duplicate current-state wording elsewhere outside generated blocks.

delivery_governance.branch_strategy: one complete Phase per branch + one PR (phase/<name>-<purpose>); governance-only uses governance/<purpose>; no direct commits to the protected default branch without explicit PO authorization
delivery_governance.merge_gate: PR merge requires the GitHub Actions 'Project Governance' check (job 'governance') to pass; local validator output alone is insufficient (GH-MANDATORY-CI)

No open Phase-2 implementation, acceptance, merge or cleanup work remains.

phase3_execution.stage: IMPLEMENTATION IN PROGRESS. INCREMENT 1 (governance + planning) DONE: baseline; read-only architecture + schema audit; connector ADR-0001 (dedicated pmsd owns each PMS Interface socket under a DB advisory single-owner lock, reusing data-plane/internal/pms/protel_fias.go -- NOT a socket inside scd/portald/edged); Phase-3 Plan + Privilege Matrix; Phase-3 governance guards + mutations; D14/T0015; branch + PR #6. INCREMENT 2 (schema + flags) DONE: machine-grounded schema gap audit against a disposable PG16 (all 18 tables exist; corrected design -- episode = stays.lifecycle_version, NO new checkout_episode column; freshness = FOUR independent axes); migration 0010_phase3_stay_resolution up/down (additive, HARDENED: pms_interface_runtime 4-axis table with coherence constraints and NO stored derived_freshness; stays effective_checkout_at + occupancy-evidence columns composite-FK-pinned + all-or-none; site_checkout_grace_config typed scalars in BYTES + canonical device_limit_policy vocab + bounds; auth_resolutions.resolution_request_id; STRICT lifecycle_version episode + one-way stays.status trigger (Post-Stay transitions removed); stay_events full-lineage append-only+terminal trigger + processed_at/review_code; EXECUTE revoked from PUBLIC); authoritative scope-restricted concurrency-guarded runner scripts/edge-migrate.sh (--only required, name-pattern validated, SHA-256 printed, advisory-lock; idempotent via public.schema_migrations); FINAL invariants: stay_events append-first on INSERT + terminal-result rules (APPLIED needs stay_id+processed_at no review_code; MANUAL_REVIEW/FAILED need bounded ^[A-Z][A-Z0-9_]{0,63}$ review_code; terminal frozen) reusing the base composite FK; Grace device policy = ONLY REJECT_NEW_DEVICE + typed policy all-or-none + config-jsonb no-duplicate-keys; lifecycle gate 98/98 PASS (runner-twice + raw-reapply-rollback + rollback==pre + reapply==post + INSERT/terminal-lineage/FK/transition/occupancy/runtime/grace/privilege/runner-scope + Part-A secret-generation-pin/event-id-immutability/concurrent-atomic-runner/target-identity/ownership); pms_config.go six Go flags (master/child, fail-closed, nil-repo-when-dark) + table-driven tests PASS; gofmt/vet/build clean; disposable DB destroyed. INCREMENT 3 (pmsd connector runtime): PMSD IMPLEMENTATION UNDER HARDENING - NOT YET ACCEPTED AS COMPLETE. PART A (migration 0010 + runner) COMPLETE + verified on disposable PG16 (98/98; post-0010 fingerprint b67b581189701193909649044bf5aa6c): A1 pms_interface_runtime.pinned_secret_generation_id + composite FK (same tenant/site/interface), CONNECTED requires pinned revision AND secret generation, identity-only never key material; A2 stay_events.id immutable + catalog-grounded column classification; A3 runner atomic lock-then-ledger (bounded advisory lock, ledger decision only under lock, SKIP_AFTER_LOCK) proven by two concurrent runner processes; A4 runner target-identity fail-closed (--expect-db, no silent ledger create, explicit --bootstrap-ledger); A5 0010 applies as NOSUPERUSER iam_v2_owner with correct ownership + no PUBLIC grants. PARTS B-D REMAIN before Increment 4: PART B pmsd architecture (assignment-scoped repo requiring tenant/site, crypto SHA-256 lock key + test vectors, secret load-after-lock + rotation reconnect, atomic PG runtime-generation CAS, independent-axis CAS, typed fail-closed connector config, config/secret/lifecycle-change reconnect, enumerated error-code vocabulary, real production-capable FIAS adapter via injectable transport, outbound allowlist at the socket write chokepoint, bounded event queue, explicit DB connection ownership + leak tests); PART C software CI (build/vet/gofmt/test/-race/PG-integration/migration-gate) + real PG16 connector integration + protocol fake-server tests; PART D zero-stale doc/PR rewrite. PRIOR increment-3 skeleton (advanced/testable, superseded by Part B): data-plane/cmd/pmsd + internal/pmsd (Deps-injected Run, supervisor one-worker-per-interface, worker ordered ownership lock->re-read->startup-persist->dial->serve, single-owner advisory Locker + pgLocker, typed Repo + pgRepo with optimistic runtime_generation upsert, three-axis freshness persistence, FIAS outbound allowlist rejecting PS/PA reusing internal/pms -- no second stack, sanitized bounded error codes) + deploy/systemd/stayconnect-pmsd.service (least-privilege: dedicated user, NoNewPrivileges, empty caps, PrivateTmp/ProtectHome/ProtectSystem=strict, Restart=on-failure so DARK never storms); flags-OFF => zero DB/repo/locker/socket/worker (spy-proven); go build/vet/gofmt clean + go test -race PASS on Linux (flags-off zero-side-effect, fail-closed, one/two-worker, competing-owner-no-socket, disabled-no-dial, revision-reread, lock-loss-closes-socket, stale-generation-rejected, startup-no-fake-HEALTHY, outbound-no-PS, sanitize-no-PII, backoff-bounded, SIGTERM-no-goroutine-leak, one-failure-isolation, lock-key-deterministic). No live PMS connection (dark; live dial deferred to increment 9). NOT YET DONE (increments 4-8): Stay/Event/Folio engine; STRICT resolver; PMS Auth Context; Commerce integration; Room Move; Checkout Grace + emergency fallback; Reinstatement; Guest Portal + Hotel Admin UI; D1-D11/F1-F7 tests; and (increment 9) live READ-ONLY PMS verification; live-dark deployment + reboot; final acceptance report. All Phase-3 flags OFF; no PMS connection; zero Phase-3 SQL in production; no runtime iam_v2 grants; no PMS financial posting; no live guest use; no Production DB accessed (all schema work on a disposable container).

database_schema_state.public_structural_fingerprint_phase1a_md: MD5 of sorted public-schema {columns + constraints + indexes} excluding the Phase-1A MG-0 anchor index guest_networks_tsi_anchor (iam_v2_scratch/prod_live_dark.sh). Phase-1A baseline; PRE-Phase-1B / pre-0007-0008.
database_schema_state.public_columns_sha256_algorithm: Phase-1B/Gate-P value. SHA-256 over information_schema.columns table.column:data_type, computed by the Gate-P tooling (iam_v2_scratch/prod_live_dark.sh). Distinct algorithm from the Phase-1A MD5 above; NOT comparable to it.
database_schema_state.public_columns_phase2_livedark_algorithm: Phase-2 live-dark value. encode(digest(string_agg(table_name||'.'||column_name||':'||data_type, chr(10) ORDER BY 1),'sha256'),'hex') over information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema='public', computed read-only on 172.21.60.23 during the Phase-2 live-dark deploy.
database_schema_state.public_columns_fingerprint_reconciliatio: public_columns_sha256_current (7241b1cd, Phase-1B/Gate-P) and public_columns_phase2_livedark_sha256 (833c3d67, Phase-2 live-dark) use DIFFERENT serializations (per-object Gate-P method vs aggregate string_agg+newline+digest). They were NOT re-verified against each other on the appliance (this reconciliation does not touch the appliance), so they are recorded as SEPARATE, NOT-directly-comparable fields. The Phase-2 darkness invariant is that the 833c3d67 value is IDENTICAL pre- and post-migration-0009 (public schema unchanged by 0009) -- proven in docs/evidence/StayConnect-IAM-Phase2-Live-Dark-Evidence.md -- not equality between the two named fields.
database_schema_state.public_structure_change_note: The Phase-1A structural baseline was intentionally superseded by the AUTHORIZED additive migrations 0007/0008 (auth_throttle_buckets, otp_hmac_key_generations, auth_otps.otp_key_generation). The pre->post SHA-256 delta (8659c08d -> 7241b1cd) is exactly those additive objects; this is authorized schema evolution, not drift.
database_schema_state.migration_0009_note: Phase-2 additive iam_v2 migration 0009_phase2_commerce applied live on 172.21.60.23 (2 trigger functions + 2 triggers + 6 lookup indexes, owned by iam_v2_owner). The public-schema columns SHA-256 is unchanged pre->post (public schema untouched); iam_v2 remains 0 rows.
database_schema_state.standby: none (an isolated second-site TEST db stayconnect_site_b exists for isolation tests; NOT a replication standby)

service_routing_state: Legacy public-schema IAM is the SOLE production authority. No service is routed to iam_v2. All new auth features (durable throttle, keyed-HMAC OTP, IAM-v2) remain OFF (dark).
pms_financial_state: FIAS lookup-only in production; posting engine is a future component (Phase 4). folio_identity_strategy DEFAULT 'UNSET' fail-closed. No programmatic reversal (v1). Hotel ID 2 financially UNAPPROVED.
network_ha_state: Two physical NICs (WAN=management, LAN=guest). Local-first/offline supported. HA failover NOT designed/implemented/accepted; HA-sync transport is an open decision.
blockers: No governance blocker: Phase 3 (PMS Stay Domain, STRICT resolution, Room Move, Checkout Grace, Reinstatement) is Product-Owner AUTHORIZED (decision D14, start transition T0015) and IMPLEMENTATION IN PROGRESS as one end-to-end Phase, DARK. Phase 1A/1B/2 remain ACCEPTED_AND_CLOSED. Two external live-action dependencies apply only to LATER Phase-3 workstreams (not this planning increment): appliance SSH access for the eventual live-dark deployment (Section 42), and a controlled PMS test reservation created by authorized hotel staff for live READ-ONLY verification (Section 39). Phase 4 remains NOT_STARTED and unauthorized.

acceptance_candidate_head_note: acceptance_candidate_head == inventory_head: the committed HEAD immediately before the final delivery-only commit, and the generation/provenance HEAD recorded in docs/manifests/Phase3-change-manifest.md. The manifest's complete path/status set describes base..delivery_head (the current Phase-3 PR HEAD); the delivery-only commit that adds the regenerated manifest + rebuilt export packs + this pointer sits one commit above inventory_head and therefore cannot appear inside its own generated manifest. Updated per Phase-3 increment. See docs/GITHUB_EXECUTION_AND_DELIVERY_RULE.md (manifest self-reference protocol).
delivery_head_note: delivery_head (the current Phase-3 PR HEAD) = inventory_head + one delivery-only commit; its SHA is recorded in the PR #6 body and the Phase-3 report, not self-referenced inside a committed artifact.
